legal.title: SERVICE AND USE AGREEMENT (SUA)
legal.parties: Between: Regatta Manager (Provider) and the club / organizer verified in the registration process (Partner)
legal.accept: I accept the SUA & publish event
legal.scrollInstruction: Please read the contract to the end to continue

sections.s1_title: § 1 Subject of Contract and Scope of Services
sections.s1_text:
The Provider provides the Partner with a cloud-based platform for the organization, administration, and processing of sailing regattas.
The scope of services includes the provision of an online registration form, the management of participant lists, and the technical interface for the automated processing of entry fee payments via integrated payment service providers.
The Provider is only responsible for providing the technical infrastructure. The execution of the sporting event is the sole responsibility of the Partner.
sections.s2_text:
The Partner is obliged to provide truthful information when creating their account and events.
The Partner ensures that their linked Stripe account is properly verified. The Provider is not liable for payout delays caused by missing identity verification (KYC) of the Partner towards the payment service provider.
sections.s3_text:
Centralization: To ensure consistent data quality and to avoid duplicates in the starting lists, the Partner undertakes to process technical registration exclusively via the Provider's platform.
Marketing Freedom: Promoting the regatta on third-party sites, association sites, or social media is expressly permitted and encouraged. However, the Partner undertakes to link exclusively to the Provider's registration portal in all advertising measures.
Exclusivity: The Partner is prohibited from offering or using parallel digital booking channels (e.g., own web forms, third-party portals, or email collection lists) for the regatta subject to this contract.
On-site registrations: If registrations are accepted on-site on the day of the regatta, they must be promptly entered into the Provider's system to maintain completeness.
sections.s4_text:
For the provision of infrastructure and transaction processing, the Provider charges a service fee of 8% of the respective gross entry fee (incl. VAT, if applicable).
The service fee is withheld directly during payment by the participant or offset as part of the settlement.
Cancellations: In the event of a cancellation by a participant, the service fee of 8% remains with the Provider. This serves to cover the transaction costs and provision expenses already incurred. The Partner is obliged to inform participants of this non-refundability in their Notice of Race.
Fee Parity: The Partner guarantees that the prices called up on the platform correspond to the cheapest available rate. Systematic increasing of fees on the platform for the purpose of fee redirection is inadmissible.
sections.s5_text:
The Partner undertakes to comply with the price levels defined in the system (esp. the consistent application of the late fee after the regular registration deadline).
A culpable breach of exclusivity (§ 3 Para. 3) or fee parity (§ 4 Para. 4) entitles the Provider to claim a contractual penalty. This is based on the amount of lost service fees, but is at least €250.00 per violation to compensate for the resulting system and reputation damage.
sections.s6_text:
The Partner indemnifies the Provider against all claims by third parties resulting from the execution of the regatta, accidents, property damage, or the violation of sports law rules.
The Provider's liability for slight negligence in the event of IT failures is excluded, provided that no essential contractual obligations are affected.
sections.s7_text:
The Partner remains the 'controller of the data' within the meaning of the GDPR, but grants the Provider the right to process the data for the fulfillment of the contract.
The Partner undertakes to publish the official final results in the Provider's system within 48 hours after the end of the event in order to maintain the platform's historical database.
sections.s8_text:
The law at the registered office of the Provider applies.
Should individual provisions of this contract be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected.

CreateEvent.stripeSetupDesc: To receive registration fees, you need a Stripe account.

Legal.feesText: Regatta Manager charges a service fee of 8%. This fee is a charge for providing the technical infrastructure and is expressly non-refundable.
Legal.section1Text: These terms govern the use of the Regatta Manager platform. Regatta Manager provides the technical infrastructure for regatta registrations and acts exclusively as an intermediary between the organizing club and the sailor.
Legal.section2TextPrefix: A service fee of 8% is charged for the use of the registration system.
Legal.section2TextHighlight: This fee is a pure processing fee for the system provision. It does not include insurance cover and is not refundable in the event of cancellation.
Legal.section3Text: The contract for sporting participation is concluded directly between the sailor and the respective club. Regatta Manager assumes no liability for the implementation, cancellation, or organization of the event itself.
Legal.section4TextPart2: The refund of the entry fee is subject to the conditions of the club.
Legal.section4TextHighlightFee: The system service fee (8%) is excluded from any refund.
Legal.section5_1_Text: Liability for damages resulting from the use of the platform is limited to intent and gross negligence.
Legal.section5_2_Text: There is no insurance cover for participants through Regatta Manager.
Legal.section5_3_Text: Regatta Manager is not liable for the accuracy of the notice of race data provided by the club.
Legal.vatText: VAT identification number according to applicable law:
Legal.euDisputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
Legal.privacySection1Text: We treat your personal data confidentially. Processing is carried out on the basis of Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR for the fulfillment of the user contract and the event registration.
Legal.privacySection2Text: We use Stripe to process payments. Data such as name and payment details are transmitted to Stripe in encrypted form to carry out the transaction in accordance with Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR.
Legal.privacySection3Text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion (Art. 17 GDPR), and data portability of your stored data at any time, as well as a right to object to the processing.
Legal.privacySection4Text: Data is only stored for as long as required for the processing of the regatta and statutory retention periods (e.g., accounting).
